subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! That which thou didst write to Jináb-i-Mírzá Ḥusayn was perused through the bounties of the Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه بجناب میرزا حسین نگاشته بودی ملاحظه گردید از الطاف شمس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @education of children; moral education, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
